descriptions: Added Config.EnableSpawnMenu — when set to false, clicking PLAY skips the spawn-selection map and instantly spawns the character at their last saved location.
Added fallback logic: if a character has no saved position, the server uses the first entry in Config.SpawnPositions.
Default behavior preserved — with EnableSpawnMenu = true (default), the spawn-selection map still shows last location, houses, and configured points.
New-character creation is unaffected and always runs the create/clothing flow.
Fixed several issues with routing bucket handling for improved stability during character selection and spawning.
